title: ophrys × arachnitiformis subsp. cilentana
intro: Ophrys × arachnitiformis subsp. cilentana is a hybrid orchid plant, specifically a cross between Ophrys arachnitiformis and a species of Ophrys, and it is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ophrys × arachnitiformis subsp. cilentana may include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
